hero.title: Your digital menu, ready in 10 minutes
hero.subtitle: Digitize your menu, share it with a QR code and update prices instantly. No apps, no complications.

features.title: Everything your restaurant needs
features.subtitle: Simple, powerful and made for the Peruvian market
features.brand_desc: Customize colors, logo and description to reflect your identity
features.qr_desc: Share your menu with a unique link or print your QR in seconds
features.multilang_desc: Serve tourists and foreign customers in their language
features.soldout_desc: Mark dishes as sold out instantly from your phone
features.photos_desc: Show appetizing images of your menu (Pro+ Plan)
features.analytics_desc: Know how many customers visit your menu and from where (Pro+ Plan)
